description:
Name: Gunny Minnie

Proficiency: Being in Command

Birth: FCU

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): FCU Greenwatch
title: FCU Greenwatch
unit_description: A Horse-ranked Greenwatch operator who specalizes in tankery. Born with a silver spoon and isn't shy to abuse it to get what she wants, she managed to convince her father to get into a prestigious tankery school to become a skilled tank operator. While she isnt shy to rely on her family's riches and influence, one cannot deny she is quite good at her job. She prefers to be in a treaded vehicle with a long-barrelled tank gun so she can lay waste to enemy armor as her skillset is geared towards that.
